title: Heap use-after-free introduced in "Dfg: resolve multi-driven signal ranges #3743"
body:
After #3743, litex_sim was crashing with a segfault. I've reduced the issue to the following minimal repro (thanks to https://github.com/renatahodovan/picireny for reducing from 7k+ lines) and found it is a use-after-free after running under ASan.

```verilog
module sim ();
  wire [2:0] c_b_a;
  wire       a;
  wire       b;
  wire       c;
  assign c_b_a = {c, {b, a}};
endmodule
```

I'll try and see if I can fix this myself and add a regression test.

Version: `Verilator 5.005 devel rev v5.004-9-g7a1545751`
OS: MacOS 13.0 arm64

ASan backtrace:
